data.name: Rent Ring Jhumka Earrings
data.description:
1) Traditional Micro Gold Polished Oxidized Pearl Earrings designed by Yosshita & Neha.
2) Look feminine and elegant by wearing these beautiful Earrings.
3) Featuring attractive designs, these Earrings can look elegant and stylish when worn with anarkali, lehengas, gowns or saris.
4) So enhance your style quotient on almost any occasion by wearing these Earrings.
5) It has Copper metal base.
6) Give a rich yet elegant touch to your attire.
7) Huggie for locking.
8) These Earrings have been intricately designed for all the jewellery lovers.

data.name: Product EAR712ON
data.description: Look gorgeous in these kundan and pearl drop hoop earrings. These earrings can go well with ethnic outfits.

data.name: Product EAR640BCS
data.description:
?Sri Shringarr Fashion Womens Real Look, Traditional Micro Gun Metal Polished American Diamond Earrings designed by Yosshita & Neha. 
\n?Look feminine and elegant by wearing these beautiful American Diamond earrings.
\n?Featuring attractive designs, these earrings can look elegant and stylish when worn with Anarkali, Lehengas, Sarees or Gown. 
\n?So enhance your style quotient on almost any occasion by wearing these earrings. 
\n?These Earrings are studded with White Coloured American Diamond stones.
\n?Comes micro gold polished. 
\n?It has Brass metal base. 
\n?Give a rich yet elegant touch to your attire. 
\n?Screw for locking. 
\n?These Earrings have been intricately designed for all the jewellery lovers.

data.name: Product T650AON
data.description:
?Women's Real Look, Traditional Micro Gold Polished Antique work Earrings designed by Yosshita & Neha. 
?Look feminine and elegant by wearing these long american diamond Earrings.
?Featuring attractive designs, these Earrings can look elegant and stylish when worn with anarkali, lehengas and saris.
